ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Swiss chard, stalk without leaves, raw
Emmental cheese, grated, from cow's milk
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Champignon de Paris 24,3%, eau, farine de sarrasin 17,3%, jambon cuit supérieur 8.8% [jambon de porc (origine: France"), eau, sel, dextrose, gélatine G de porc, bouillon (blette, acérola, carotte), ferments], emmental français râpé 8,2% (contient LAIT), farine de BLE (GLUTEN) 8.2%, CEUF entier 5.2% (liquide, pasteurisé), crème fraîche liquide (LAIT), amidon de riz, lactose (LAIT), oignon, sel, huile de tournesol, ail, cèpe déshydraté, poivre.
